code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut out = ""
mut first = true
for t in tokens
  if first
    out = "#{t} #{t}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{t} #{t}"
  end
end
println(out)
